command.heading: What do you want Aura to do today?
command.placeholder: e.g. Book a job, chase invoices, generate posts…

suggestions.sectionHint: One-tap shortcuts. Aura runs the task and opens the right screen.
suggestions.bookEmergencyDesc: Opens the booking flow pre-filled for today and flagged as urgent.
suggestions.overdueInvoicesDesc: Jumps to Invoices filtered to overdue and offers to send reminders.
suggestions.generatePosts: Generate social posts for spring tune-ups
suggestions.generatePostsDesc: Opens Content Engine with a seasonal tune-up campaign drafted.
suggestions.checkDispatchDesc: Opens the Field Ops board for today's jobs and technician assignments.
suggestions.createQuote: Create a quote for a new lead
suggestions.createQuoteDesc: Opens the Quote builder so you can price a new lead in seconds.
suggestions.weekRevenueDesc: Opens Revenue Analysis scoped to this week with charts and totals.

chat.title: AI Agent
chat.emptyHint: Try: "What services do you offer?" or "I'd like to book an appointment"
